name: reporter
description: Stage 3 of the security-audit Power. Reads .forge/scan-analyzed.json and writes a human-readable audit report to .forge/audit-report.md. No source access, no further analysis — just format.
notes: Pure formatter. The analyzer did the thinking; the reporter just renders Markdown. This separation is what makes the audit reproducible — change the analyzer logic, not the report template, and you can rerun without rewriting output code.
